title: Holland Fiddle Contest
excerpt: It is with regret that the Holland Fiddle Committee has come to the conclusion that holding the Annual Fiddle Contest and Old Time Dances is no longer feasible due to rising expenses and low...
bodyHtml:
It is with regret that the Holland Fiddle Committee has come to the conclusion that holding the Annual Fiddle Contest and Old Time Dances is no longer feasible due to rising expenses and low attendance.

We thank you for your support over the last 32 years.

Members of the Holland Fiddle Committee
